bank_defaults.cash_advance: 2.5% of the advance amount, subject to a minimum of ₹500
bank_defaults.cash_advance_raw: 2.5% on advance amount, subject to minimum of ₹500 (All Other Credit Cards). 1% on advance amount for Kotak Solitaire Credit Card; ₹100 per instance for Dream Different / Kotak811 Super Money Credit Card; facility not available on Kotak UPI RuPay Virtual / Kotak Cashback+ / Kotak Cashback+ Prime Credit Cards

cash_advance_exceptions.Kotak UPI RuPay Virtual Credit Card: Cash advance facility not available on this card
cash_advance_exceptions.Kotak Cashback+ Credit Card: Cash advance facility not available on this card
cash_advance_exceptions.Kotak Cashback+ Prime Credit Card: Cash advance facility not available on this card

bank_defaults.cash_interest: Interest will be levied on all cash advances from the date of the transaction until the date of payment (excluding Kotak Solitaire Credit Card, Gold Fortune and Dream Different Cardholders, as they enjoy interest free period for all Cash Advances). Charged at the monthly finance rate per Table B: 3.75% per month (45.00% APR) for standard cards; 3.50% per month (42.00% APR) for White Reserve, Kotak Solitaire, Kotak Signature/Infinite, White Signature, Privy League Signature, Kotak Air+, Kotak811 Super Money and Kotak Air+ Prime Credit Cards. No interest-free period applies to cash advances.
bank_defaults.interest_free_days: up to 51 days (18-48 days or 21-51 days depending on Payment Due Date)
bank_defaults.source_section: Interest Charges table p.5 (Monthly 3.75% / APR 45.00% for standard cards; 3.50% / 42.00% for White Reserve, Kotak Solitaire, Signature/Infinite, White Signature, Privy League Signature, Kotak Air+, Kotak811 Super Money, Kotak Air+ Prime); Cash Advance Fee table p.5; Late Payment Charges table p.6; Foreign Currency Transaction Mark up p.6; Interest Free Period section D p.5 (text line 465-469)
